name: EZCORP INC
summary: Purpose, Vision and Strategy EZCORP, Inc. is a leading provider of pawn services in the United States (U.S.) and Latin America with 1,360 locations and approximately 8,500 Team Members. We are a Delaware corporation headquartered in Austin, Texas. Our purpose statement: We exist to serve our customers short-term cash and pre-owned retail needs, helping them to live and enjoy their lives.
